name: Technical depth (role-relative)
description: Understands internals in their stack; can go down levels to debug/perf as needed.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Surface-level familiarity; relies on others to debug

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Comfortable within common patterns; can debug with support

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Deep internals mastery; mentors others; improves platform
